title: Coot Interesting Places
description: Schema for the JSON consumed by Coot's read_interesting_places_json() / read_interesting_places_json_file(). It describes a set of named sections, each holding a list of 'interesting' positions in the active molecule that are presented as buttons in the interesting-positions dialog.

title.description: Title for the interesting-positions dialog. Optional; defaults to "<Title>" if absent.

sections.description: The sections shown in the dialog. Each section groups a set of items.

section.description: A named group of interesting-position items.

items.description: The interesting positions in this section.

item.description: A single interesting position. The value of "position-type" selects which spec field is read; items lacking a recognised "position-type" are ignored.

position-type.description: Discriminator selecting how the position is specified.

atom-1-spec.description: First atom; used when position-type is "by-atom-spec-pair".

atom-2-spec.description: Second atom; used when position-type is "by-atom-spec-pair".

atomSpec.description: An atom specification as a 5-tuple: [chain_id, res_no, ins_code, atom_name, alt_conf]. Only read when it has exactly 5 elements.

residueSpec.description: A residue specification. Either a 3-tuple [chain_id, res_no, ins_code], or a 5-tuple whose first three elements are used (an ins_code of a single space is treated as empty). Only 3- or 5-element arrays are read.

cartesian.description: A position in orthogonal coordinates as [x, y, z]. Only read when it has exactly 3 elements.
